title: Mazars Comment: The Next Five Bull Markets
section_path: Mazars Comment: The Next Five Bull Markets
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: The Next Five Bull Markets
summary:
Main
Summary:
Last week saw more persistent than expected inflation and very strong January retail sales in the US. Fed officials took to the microphones, suggesting that markets should expect potentially more than the two rate hikes they are expecting now. Bullish markets heard that as "we may not cut rates this year" and took some profit off the table.
